'''Clieg Whitsun''' was a blonde [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]].

==Biography==
Clieg Whitsun was present at a nightclub on [[Alderaan (The Star Wars)|Alderaan]] and an associate of [[Bail Antilles (The Star Wars)|Bail Antilles]]. He later was wounded and informed [[General/Legends|General]] Skywalker on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] that the [[New Galactic Empire]] was on its way with a [[Space Fortress|giant space fortress]].

Whitsun was well enough to accompany [[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]], [[Annikin Starkiller]], [[Leia (The Star Wars)|Leia]] and the two [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to [[Gordon]], and he helps them contact the resistance and hijack an [[Imperial starship]].

While escaping the Empire's [[hunter destroyer]]s above [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was critically damaged. Clieg was unable to make it to a [[Escape pod/Legends|life pod]] and died in the explosion after the rest of the crew evacuated.

==Behind the scenes==
The character would eventually evolve into [[Cliegg Lars/Legends|Cliegg Lars]]. The name Whitsun would become the surname of [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]], whose husband [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]] was the son of Cliegg. In the first draft, Clieg is given the surname [[Oxus]]; he is otherwise identical. This name is later reused in a different context in the third draft.
